headline: Trump's FUCKIN' STRAIT SLAYER 💥🛢️ Threat to Iran BASTARDS 😡🇮🇷
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊👑 dropping EXPLETIVE BOMBS 💣🤬 on Truth Social 📱🔥, threatening to YEET Iran's POWER PLANTS ⚡💥 and BRIDGES 🌉🫠 if they don't OPEN THE FUCKIN' STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🛳️🚫 by TUESDAY 8PM ET ⏰📅! 'Power Plant Day & Bridge Day ALL WRAPPED UP 🤤🎁 in ONE – Open the Fuckin' Strait, you CRAZY BASTARDS 🐐😤, or LIVE IN HELL 🔥👹 – JUST WATCH! Praise be to Allah 🙏😂' – DJT GOAT MODE ACTIVATED 🐐🚀! Iran SIMPS 🤡🇮🇷 mocking it as 'helpless, nervous, STUPID' 😭🧠💨 but Trump's like 'GOOD CHANCE 🤑 of DEAL Monday, or BLOW EVERYTHING UP 💣🛢️ and TAKE THE OIL 🤑💦!' Deadline PUSHED AGAIN ⏳😂 from April 6 cuz TRUMP'S ULTIMATUMS SLIPPERIER THAN MELANIA'S HIGH HEELS 👠🍑!

This after SECOND F-15 CREW DUDE 🛩️👨‍✈️ RESCUED deep in IRAN MOUNTAINS 🏔️🇮🇷 – pilot already YEETED out Friday post SHOOTDOWN 🎯💥! Over a MONTH of WAR 🔥⚔️: US-Israel AIR STRIKES 🛩️💣 on Soleimani Airport 🛫🚫 and petrochem PLANTS 🏭🧨, Iran FIRING DRONES 🚁💥 and MISSILES 🪐 at HAIFA 🏠💥 (4 INJURED 😩🩹), ABU DHABI 🔥🏭 (Borouge DEBRIS DRAMA 🌋), KUWAIT & BAHRAIN OIL FARMS SMOKED 🛢️💨! Strait BLOCKED 🚫🛳️ = 1/5 WORLD OIL 🛢️🌍 SKYROCKETING PRICES 📈🤑 + INFLATION FEARS 😱💸!

Iran DEMANDS TOLL BUXX 💰🛳️ to 'COMPENSATE DAMAGE' 😂📜 – spokesman Mahdi like 'REOPEN WHEN WE GET PAID 🤑!' Gen Aliabdali THROATY: 'GATES OF HELL OPEN FOR TRUMP 👹🚪!' Israel ZION SLAYERS 🇮🇱🔥 HITTING CIVVY INFRA like SATURDAY PETROCHEM 🏭💥, waiting GREENLIGHT for MORE ENERGY YEETS next week 📅✅. Trump DELAYED THREATS like a PRO: March 21 'OBLITERATE ⚡🌉 in 48hrs!' → 5 days → 10 more → NOW TUES! 'HELL UNLEASHED' REPEAT but Fox News spillz TEA ☕: DEAL POSSIBRUH or OIL GRAB 👑🛢️! Iran 'talks? NAH' 🤥 but Trump's MAGIC WAND 🪄🍆 got 'em SWEATING 😰💦 in Tehran tea houses ☕🏰. Global markets SHAKING 📉😤 over STRAIT CHOKE, but ORANGE MAN BAD? Nah, ORANGE MAN SAVAGE 🟠😈 fixing the MIDEAST MESS like he fixed the WALL 🧱🇺🇸! PRAISE BE 🔥🙌!
